---
title: About
---

This project was developed by **Standard Deviants** For [STA/ISS 313L: Advanced Data Visualization](https://vizdata.org/) at Duke University. The team is comprised of the following team members.

-   Team member 1: Naya Ko is a Data Science major in Duke Kunshan University’s class of 2027.
-   Team member 2: N'Avea Saint Louis is a Computer Science major in Duke University's class of 2026.
-   Team member 3: Alain Fornes is a Computer Science and Statistics major in Duke University's class of 2026.
-   Team member 4:  Tuna Korkmaz is a Computer Science and Statistics major in Duke University's class of 2027.
